corrections.text: games.slashdot.org is not on the project's source_allowlist. Slashdot is a long-established moderated tech-news aggregator; the cited piece is a discussion thread containing first-hand observations about NetHack 5.0 from a verified user. All claims attributed to Slashdot were verified verbatim against the snapshot during review. Adding slashdot.org to config/source_allowlist.txt is recommended.
